holdings.infoBox: IQSU is an equity ETF with a total of 268 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 9.77%, Alphabet at 5.89%, Alphabet at 4.99%, Amazon.com at 4.90%, and Microsoft at 4.15%.

overview.description: The NYLI Candriam U.S. Large Cap Equity ETF (IQSU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the IQ Candriam ESG US Equity index. The fund tracks a proprietary index of large-cap US stocks selected by ESG criteria and weighted by market capitalization. IQSU was launched on Dec 17, 2019 and is issued by New York Life Investments.
infoTable: IQ Candriam ESG US Equity Index
